notes: Read from the official 2026 Dormont Borough Recycling and Bulk Collection calendar (WM). Each date is the Monday that starts the week. Independence Day (Jul 4) falls on Saturday so causes no delay.
holidayRule: If a holiday falls on a weekday, that day's collection and all remaining collections for the rest of the week are delayed by one day. Holidays on Saturday or Sunday cause no delay.
bulkPickup: First full week of every month (up to 2 items curbside).
